display_text: Eye of the Vizier, Cost: 0, Tier 3: Neutral item providing +125/135 Cast Range, +1/1.5 Mana Regeneration, and a 15% Max Mana penalty. Enhances spellcaster positioning and mana sustain but reduces overall mana pool, demanding careful management. Ideal for heroes who rely on long-range initiation or frequent spell usage. Stats: Cast Range: +125 / +135, Mana Regen: +1 / +1.5, Mana Penalty: -15% Max Mana.
